patch.value: assertExtensionManifestMatchesBlueprint(manifest, blueprint): strict least-privilege CI guard against capability drift

Throwing testing helper in src/sdk/testing.ts. Reconciles manifest.capabilities against deriveExtensionCapabilities(blueprint) via lintExtensionBlueprint, then throws on ANY capability finding -> undeclared (would crash activation with extension_capability_missing) AND unused (least-privilege violation). The STRICT bookend to the lenient assertExtensionBlueprint (which only warns on unused). Returns {ok, used, declared, missing, unused, findings}.

Shipped assertExtensionManifestMatchesBlueprint(manifest, blueprint) in src/sdk/testing.ts: strict bookend to assertExtensionBlueprint — throws on BOTH undeclared (missing) and unused (over-grant) capabilities. Verified drift detection both directions via built dist. 100% cov.
